properties.name: Ross Dress for Less
properties.description: Methane from Salt Lake Oil Field exploded at 4:47 PM,  ripping open the store roof and injuring 23. Cited by U.S.  House Rep. Henry Waxman to justify federal funding ban on Wilshire/Fairfax subway tunneling, redirecting Metro Red Line to Vermont alignment.
properties.source: Elkind,  Railtown (UC Press, 2014); Ramos & Harvey, LA Times, 3/25/1985
